# Story 1-1: Initialize Test Project

## Story Header

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **ID** | 1-1 |
| **Key** | test-1-1 |
| **Epic** | epic-1 |
| **Title** | Initialize Test Project |

## Story Requirements

### User Story

As a developer,
I want to initialize a test project,
so that I can verify the sync workflow.

### Acceptance Criteria

1. Project structure is created
2. Initial files are in place

## Developer Context

### Technical Requirements

- Use standard Go project layout
- Include basic cmd/ and pkg/ directories

## Implementation Checklist

- [ ] Create project structure
- [ ] Add initial files
